39.reason: [This resets x to 0, discarding the previously stored coefficients in ans3. The exponents are then written to the same indices, but not paired with their corresponding coefficients, leading to mismatched coefficient-exponent pairs.]

58.reason: [This should be ans3[w].xi += ans3[e].xi; instead of doubling ans3[w].xi. This error causes incorrect coefficient accumulation during term merging.]
